description: Golden cases for webapp ATCFormatter + classify_speaker_role. Expected outputs match current behavior for regression; update when behavior intentionally changes.

cases.input: NOVEMBER NINE NINE EIGHT BRAVO BRAVO radar services terminated. Squawk VFR, change to advisory is approved.
cases.expected_formatted: NOVEMBER NINE NINE EIGHT BRAVO BRAVO radar services terminated squawk VFR, change to advisory is approved
expected_violations: ⚠ Periods should not be used (Image 3: Punctuation Rules)

cases.input: United 2648, contact Atlantic City 135.5. November 29-18 radar services terminated.
cases.expected_formatted: UNITED TWO SIX FOUR EIGHT, contact atlantic city one three five five NOVEMBER TWO NINE ONE EIGHT radar services terminated
expected_violations: ⚠ Numbers should be spelled out - write 'one two three' not '123' (Images 6-7: Number Rules)
⚠ No hyphens between numbers - write 'two six four eight' not '26-48' (Image 7)

cases.input: NOVEMBER TWENTY-NINE EIGHTEEN radar services terminated
cases.expected_formatted: NOVEMBER TWENTY NINE EIGHTEEN radar services terminated
expected_violations: ⚠ No hyphens in number words - write 'TWENTY NINE' not 'TWENTY-NINE' (Image 7)
No standard ATC phraseology detected. Use FAA JO 7110.65BB, AIM Chapter 4, and Pilot/Controller Glossary terms (e.g., 'roger', 'cleared', 'contact').

cases.input: One three two four two, thanks, so long, VIVA ONE EIGHT SEVEN
cases.expected_formatted: one three two four two, thanks, so long, VIVA ONE EIGHT SEVEN
expected_violations: No standard ATC phraseology detected. Use FAA JO 7110.65BB, AIM Chapter 4, and Pilot/Controller Glossary terms (e.g., 'roger', 'cleared', 'contact').

cases.input: VOLARIS SEVENTEEN ZERO TWO, Flight Level three six zero
cases.expected_formatted: VOLARIS SEVENTEEN ZERO TWO, flight level three six zero
expected_violations: No standard ATC phraseology detected. Use FAA JO 7110.65BB, AIM Chapter 4, and Pilot/Controller Glossary terms (e.g., 'roger', 'cleared', 'contact').

cases.input: MOBILE FOUR, Salinas ground proceed to CTAC Delta Papa Charlie, hold short Runway three one at Charlie
cases.expected_formatted: mobile four, Salinas ground proceed to ctac DELTA PAPA CHARLIE, hold short runway three one at CHARLIE
expected_violations: ⚠ 'Runway' should not be capitalized - it's not a callsign (Image 5: Capitalization)

cases.input: Southwest 1837, turn right heading 090, descend & maintain 4,000.
cases.expected_formatted: SOUTHWEST ONE EIGHT THREE SEVEN, turn right heading zero nine zero, descend & maintain four zero zero zero
expected_violations: ⚠ Periods should not be used (Image 3: Punctuation Rules)
⚠ Numbers should be spelled out - write 'one two three' not '123' (Images 6-7: Number Rules)

cases.input: N123AB, taxi to Runway 27R via Alpha & Bravo.
cases.expected_formatted: NOVEMBER ONE TWO THREE ALFA B, taxi to runway two sevenr via alpha & BRAVO
expected_violations: ⚠ Periods should not be used (Image 3: Punctuation Rules)
⚠ 'Runway' should not be capitalized - it's not a callsign (Image 5: Capitalization)

cases.input: United 123, copy that, cleared to land
cases.expected_formatted: UNITED ONE TWO THREE, copy that, cleared to land
expected_violations: ⚠ Numbers should be spelled out - write 'one two three' not '123' (Images 6-7: Number Rules)
Prohibited phrase: 'copy that' is not standard ATC phraseology (FAA JO 7110.65BB / AIM Ch.4 / Pilot-Controller Glossary)

cases.input: hotel tango sierra 18 fly heading 260 vectors for, make it 265 vectors for climb, climb and maintain flight level 230
cases.expected_formatted: HOTEL TANGO SIERRA one eight fly heading two six zero vector for, make it two six five vector for climb, climb and maintain flight level two three zero
expected_violations: ⚠ Numbers should be spelled out - write 'one two three' not '123' (Images 6-7: Number Rules)

cases.input: atis information zulu time one eight zero zero
cases.expected_formatted: ATIS information ZULU time one eight zero zero
expected_violations: No standard ATC phraseology detected. Use FAA JO 7110.65BB, AIM Chapter 4, and Pilot/Controller Glossary terms (e.g., 'roger', 'cleared', 'contact').
